name: supervised-learning
desc: Implementations of algorithms trained on labeled data. Includes classification models, regression analysis, and Support Vector Machines (SVMs).

name: unsupervised-learning
desc: Algorithms for discovering hidden patterns in unlabeled data. Focuses on clustering and dimensionality reduction.

name: reinforcement-learning
desc: Environment-interaction models where agents learn via reward systems. Includes Q-learning and autonomous agents.

name: deep-learning
desc: Complex neural network architectures: CNNs, RNNs, Transformers, and GANs.

name: nlp-and-llms
desc: NLP tools, text classification, RAG architectures, and fine-tuning pipelines for LLMs.

name: computer-vision
desc: Visual data processing systems: object detection, OCR tools, and image segmentation logic.

name: data-engineering
desc: Backbone operations: ETL pipelines, Apache Spark, Airflow DAGs, and advanced SQL.

name: exploratory-data-analysis
desc: Notebooks for initial data investigations, automated profiling, and correlation analysis.

name: feature-engineering
desc: Preprocessing techniques: categorical encoding, feature scaling, and automated selection.

name: statistical-analysis
desc: Rigorous mathematical modeling, hypothesis testing, and A/B testing execution.

name: time-series-analysis
desc: Analyzing temporal data: ARIMA models, forecasting algorithms, and anomaly detection.

name: data-visualization
desc: Visual representation layer: Matplotlib, Plotly, and interactive D3.js dashboards.

name: mlops-and-deployment
desc: Production infrastructure: CI/CD automation, Dockerization, and API scripts for model serving.

name: demo-repository
desc: Baseline template codebase demonstrating standard structure and best practices.
